pi_items.source: Explicitly required by the task description ('Sort by: Name (Alphabetical)') and corresponds to the 'sidebarSortby' API preference.
Explicitly required by the task description ('Group by Type: Enable (ON)') and corresponds to the 'sidebarGroupByType' API preference.
Explicitly required by the task description ('View Mode: Condensed') and corresponds to the 'sidebarViewMode' API preference.
Explicitly required by the task description ('Mark the #release-updates channel as a Favorite') and checked via the subscriptions API.
Explicitly required by the task description ('Hide the #general channel') and checked via the subscriptions API 'open' state.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates in a simulated Rocket.Chat environment where the target sidebar configurations are synthetically defined by the prompt. Explicitly verified that the expected API preference values ('alphabetical' sorting, 'condensed' view mode, true 'sidebarGroupByType'), as well as the target channels for favoriting ('release-updates') and hiding ('general'), directly match the task description instructions and the verifier scripts.
